Title: Login successfully with valid user
Step detail: 1. Open https://www.saucedemo.com/ | 2. Enter valid username | 3. Enter valid password | 4. Click Login
Expected result: User is redirected to /inventory.html; Products page is displayed.

Title: Login with invalid password
Step detail: 1. Open login page | 2. Enter valid username | 3. Enter invalid password | 4. Click Login
Expected result: Error message is displayed; user stays on login page.

Title: Login with locked out user
Step detail: 1. Open login page | 2. Enter locked username | 3. Enter valid password | 4. Click Login
Expected result: Error message indicates the user is locked out.

Title: Verify inventory page loads after successful login
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Wait for inventory page to load
Expected result: URL contains inventory.html; page title Products is visible.

Title: Verify all products are displayed
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Count product items on the inventory page
Expected result: 6 products are displayed.

Title: Verify product card information is displayed
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Check product card information
Expected result: Product name, image, description, price, and Add to cart button are visible.

Title: Sort products from A to Z
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Select Name (A to Z) from sort dropdown | 3. Get all product names
Expected result: Product names are sorted alphabetically from A to Z.

Title: Sort products from Z to A
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Select Name (Z to A) from sort dropdown | 3. Get all product names
Expected result: Product names are sorted from Z to A.

Title: Sort products by price low to high
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Select Price (low to high) from sort dropdown | 3. Get all product prices
Expected result: Product prices are sorted in ascending order.

Title: Sort products by price high to low
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Select Price (high to low) from sort dropdown | 3. Get all product prices
Expected result: Product prices are sorted in descending order.

Title: Add one product to cart
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Click Add to cart for Sauce Labs Backpack
Expected result: Button changes to Remove; cart badge shows 1.

Title: Add multiple products to cart
Testdata: products=Sauce Labs Backpack, Sauce Labs Bike Light
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Add Sauce Labs Backpack | 3. Add Sauce Labs Bike Light
Expected result: Cart badge shows 2.

Title: Remove product from inventory page
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Add Sauce Labs Backpack to cart | 3. Click Remove
Expected result: Button changes back to Add to cart; cart badge is removed or decreased.

Title: Navigate to cart page from cart icon
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Click cart icon
Expected result: User is redirected to /cart.html.

Title: Open product detail from product name
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Click product name Sauce Labs Backpack
Expected result: User is redirected to product detail page; selected product detail is displayed.

Title: Open product detail from product image
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Click product image
Expected result: User is redirected to product detail page.

Title: Open burger menu
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Click burger menu icon
Expected result: Sidebar menu is visible with All Items, About, Logout, and Reset App State.

Title: Logout from inventory page
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Open burger menu | 3. Click Logout
Expected result: User is redirected to login page.

Title: Reset app state clears cart
Testdata: add one product to cart first
Step detail: 1. Login successfully | 2. Add one product to cart | 3. Open burger menu | 4. Click Reset App State
Expected result: Cart badge is cleared; product button returns to Add to cart.

Title: Access inventory page without login
Step detail: 1. Clear browser session/cookies | 2. Open inventory URL directly
Expected result: User cannot access inventory page; user is redirected to login page or sees login-required error.
